title: the result is incorrect when using window function including multiple sort_spec
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ordertest(str TEXT, orderA INTEGER, orderB INTEGER, num INTEGER, price REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00);

SELECT *,
 (SELECT SUM(num) FROM ordertest AS t1 WHERE t1.orderA <= ordertest.orderA) AS orderbyA,
 (SELECT SUM(num) FROM ordertest AS t2 WHERE t2.orderA <= ordertest.orderA AND t2.orderB <= ordertest.orderB) AS orderbyAB,
 (SELECT SUM(num) FROM ordertest AS t3 WHERE t3.orderB <= ordertest.orderB AND t3.orderA <= ordertest.orderA) AS orderbyBA,
 (SELECT SUM(num) FROM ordertest AS t4 WHERE t4.orderB <= ordertest.orderB) AS orderbyB
 FROM ordertest;
key_bug_features: incorrect results with multiple sort specifications in window function
